_doc: Reusable FULL-WARMUP macro. Performs the canonical 'get me to a state where I can attack' chain: login, fetch CSRF, optionally fetch a stateful page that sets additional cookies. Composes macro-login + macro-refresh-csrf via nested includes. After this macro: session active + {{csrf}} fresh + warmed-up cookie jar. Caller supplies: {{base_url}}, {{user}}, {{pass}}.

steps.name: _warmup_initial_get
steps._comment: Some apps don't fully establish a session until you GET an authenticated page once. Belt-and-suspenders.
